name: sdlc-kit
description: Spec-Driven Development kit for Claude Code. Two composable plugins: sdlc-kit (core — 11 skills for the daily PR loop) and sdlc-kit-extended (11 optional skills for governance, architecture/domain modeling and post-delivery analysis).

plugins.name: sdlc-kit
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development for Claude Code. 11 skills for the daily PR loop — init, PRDs, ADRs, SDD specs (EARS), tasks, git worktrees, code reviews (Code Reviewer + AppSec dual-axis), retrospectives. Includes a PostToolUse hook that auto-indexes every .md save into a SQLite tracker. Self-contained HTML dashboard (Kanban + branch graph) included.

plugins.name: sdlc-kit-extended
plugins.description: 11 optional skills layered on top of sdlc-kit core. Adds governance (TRDs, epics, milestones, steering), architecture & domain modeling (C4 diagrams in 3 levels, API contracts in 4 styles, DDD aggregates/events/contracts, design system tokens), and post-delivery analysis (incidents with auto-timestamps, traceability matrix, BFS impact analysis). Requires sdlc-kit core.
